description: A reproduction of a Norman Rockwell painting depicting a multigenerational family gathered around a white-clothed dining table as an older woman in an apron sets down a large roast turkey on a platter and an older man stands behind her. Family members seated around the table smile and look toward the food. Overlaid centered white text reads Ensure A Future Of Plenty above a smaller line reading USCIS.GOV/JOIN. The artist signature appears in the lower left corner.
notable_text: Ensure A Future Of Plenty; USCIS.GOV/JOIN; Norman Rockwell
